title: Braised Pork Curry
description: Slow-cooked pork in a rich and flavorful Thai-inspired curry sauce. Serve with steamed rice or noodles for a comforting meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear pork chunks until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove pork from pot and set aside.
Soften onion and garlic in pot, about 3-4 minutes.
Add curry paste and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add fish sauce, soy sauce, and brown sugar; stir to combine.
Add coconut milk and water, stirring to combine.
Return pork to pot; cover and transfer to the oven.
Braise pork at 300°F (150°C) for 2-3 hours, or until tender.
Serve pork with sauce spooned over the top.
